accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: CRA disapproval, IRS rule title, Fed. Reg. citation, dates, and Public Law 119-5.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Congressional Review Act reference is accurate context for chapter 8 of title 5.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies the IRS digital asset broker reporting rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the rule is disapproved and rendered without force or effect under the CRA.

exceptions_conditions.why: The one-line resolution contains no material exceptions or carve-outs to summarize.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the April 10, 2025 approval date and that the resolution sets no future effective dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproving the rule so it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, factual description with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the IRS, the CRA, the rule title, and Public Law 119-5.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation (89 Fed. Reg. 106928), publication date Dec. 30, 2024, and approval date Apr. 10, 2025 are all correct.
